creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As rdatmans@pacbell.net wrote:

> When trying to mount floppies that has a S51K/S52K file system type
> I get an error message "Wrong Super Block."

Sorry, System V filesystems (the old ones, they now use UFS, too) are
unsupported.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
